title: Alsine sedoides
intro: Alsine sedoides, also known as sedum-stemmed Alsine or Alsine sedoides, is a low-growing, perennial herb belonging to the Caryophyllaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The bioactive constituents of Alsine sedoides include flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. The plant is often used to make herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are commonly consumed to alleviate respiratory symptoms and promote overall well-being.
